query:
SELECT rc.username, rc.attribute, rc.op, rc.value, cards.status, cards.createdBy, cards.planId
FROM radcheck rc
LEFT JOIN radius_cards cards ON rc.username = cards.username
WHERE cards.createdBy = 17
ORDER BY cards.id DESC
LIMIT 10;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT rc.username, rc.attribute, rc.op, rc.value, cards.status, cards.createdBy, cards.planId

LEFT JOIN radius_cards cards ON rc.username = cards.username
